properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The day before yesterday, They crucified my Lord; Beat Him unmercif'lly and nailed Him to a tree. The sky grew dark and the earth began to fog, People cried, "surely we've crucified the Son of God."

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Why didn't we recognize the Mighty God was here today, Didn't our hearts burn as He/Jesus talked along the way? Shouldn't we have known, Shouldn't we have known? Wish we had known Him Before the Lord has come and gone.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Today a friend and I walked down the road, Didn't know our Lord had arose. A man drew near and spoke words so wise, Broke the bread and blessed it, And instant opened up our eyes.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'm so glad I recognize the Son of Man appeared today, Don't our hearts burn as He talks along the way; Are you glad you know, Are you glad you know? I'm so glad I know Him, Should He come, I will be gone.
